subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth and is worthy of the Desired One, Who hath shown forth the straight path and sent forth a guide, placing in every station a treasure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصودی را لایق و سزا که راه درست نمود و راهنما فرستاد در هر مقام کنزی گذاشت
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
